let OldValue = require('../old-value') let Value = require('../value') class Pixelated extends Value { /** * Different name for WebKit and Firefox */ old(prefix) { if (prefix === '-webkit-') { return new OldValue(this.name, '-webkit-optimize-contrast') } if (prefix === '-moz-') { return new OldValue(this.name, '-moz-crisp-edges') } return super.old(prefix) } /** * Use non-standard name for WebKit and Firefox */ replace(string, prefix) { if (prefix === '-webkit-') { return string.replace(this.regexp(), '$1-webkit-optimize-contrast') } if (prefix === '-moz-') { return string.replace(this.regexp(), '$1-moz-crisp-edges') } return super.replace(string, prefix) } } Pixelated.names = ['pixelated'] module.exports = Pixelated
